aggregate_claim.allowed_wording: Across the tested datasets and 10/20/30 percent budgets, TRACE-BiOpt has the lowest mean held-out GLS/MAP MAE against the pre-registered non-BiOpt baseline set.
aggregate_claim.required_caveat: All nine tested dataset-budget rows satisfy the paired-dominance gate; claims still remain restricted to the tested datasets and the pre-registered non-BiOpt baseline set.

rows.allowed_wording: TRACE-BiOpt achieved the lowest mean held-out GLS/MAP MAE among all pre-registered non-BiOpt baselines on PeMS7_1026 at 10% sensor budget in the current-best evidence chain via the replaceable Stage16 calibrated rerun `pems7_1026_10_20_posterior_iter20`.
rows.forbidden_wording: Do not claim global optimality, universal dominance over untested baselines, cross-network generalization, or statistically significant superiority unless the paired-test gate is satisfied for PeMS7_1026 10%.
rows.required_caveat: Report paired statistics and restrict the claim to tested pre-registered baselines.
